name: io.github.j0hanz/gemini-assistant
description: Workflow-first MCP server for Google Gemini with sessions and workspace context

environmentVariables.name: API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Google Gemini API key — obtain from Google AI Studio (aistudio.google.com)

environmentVariables.name: MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Gemini model to use. Defaults to gemini-3-flash-preview

environmentVariables.name: TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport mode: stdio (default), http, or web-standard

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for HTTP transport (minimum 32 characters). Required when TRANSPORT=http without MCP_ALLOW_UNAUTHENTICATED_LOOPBACK_HTTP
